sentences.target: Ich brauche einen Übersetzer fürs Treffen.

translations.de: Ich brauche einen Übersetzer fürs Treffen.
translations.en: I need a translator for the meeting.
translations.es: Necesito un intérprete para la reunión.
translations.fr: J'ai besoin d'un interprète pour la réunion.
translations.it: Ho bisogno di un interprete per la riunione.
translations.zh-Hans: 我需要一位口译员参加会议。
translations.pt: Preciso de um intérprete para a reunião.
translations.tr: Toplantı için bir tercümana ihtiyacım var.
translations.vi: Tôi cần thông dịch viên cho cuộc họp.
translations.nl: Ik heb een tolk nodig voor de vergadering.
translations.hi: मुझे बैठक के लिए दुभाषिए की ज़रूरत है.
translations.nb: Jeg trenger en tolk til møtet.
translations.sv: Jag behöver en tolk till mötet.
translations.ro: Am nevoie de un interpret pentru ședință.
translations.da: Jeg har brug for en tolk til mødet.
translations.ja: 会議には通訳が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects an accusative object and a prepositional phrase.
Indefinite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner for ‘Übersetzer’.
Common noun, masculine; here singular accusative as the direct object of ‘brauche’.
Preposition ‘für’ fused with article ‘das’ (für + das); governs accusative and introduces a purpose/endpoint PP.
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition ‘für’, accusative singular.

sentences.target: Mein Bruder ist Übersetzer in Berlin.

translations.de: Mein Bruder ist Übersetzer in Berlin.
translations.en: My brother is a translator in Berlin.
translations.es: Mi hermano es traductor en Berlín.
translations.fr: Mon frère est traducteur à Berlin.
translations.it: Mio fratello è traduttore a Berlino.
translations.ru: Мой брат работает переводчиком в Берлине.
translations.pt: Meu irmão é tradutor em Berlim.
translations.vi: Anh trai tôi là dịch giả ở Berlin.
translations.nl: Mijn broer is vertaler in Berlijn.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई बर्लिन में अनुवादक है.
translations.pl: Mój brat jest tłumaczem w Berlinie.
translations.el: Ο αδερφός μου είναι μεταφραστής στο Βερολίνο.
translations.nb: Broren min er oversetter i Berlin.
translations.id: Saudara laki-laki saya adalah penerjemah di Berlin.
translations.sv: Min bror är översättare i Berlin.
translations.ro: Fratele meu este traducător în Berlin.
translations.cs: Můj bratr je překladatel v Berlíně.
translations.da: Min bror er oversætter i Berlin.
translations.ja: 兄はベルリンで翻訳者をしています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; agrees with ‘Bruder’. Nominative masculine singular (no ending in this position).
Common noun, masculine; nominative singular, head of the subject NP.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject to a predicative noun.
Common noun used as a predicate nominal (predicative complement), nominative singular.
Preposition introducing a locative PP; with static location it governs dative (proper names are uninflected).
Proper noun; object of the preposition ‘in’, indicating location.

sentences.target: Sie fragt den Übersetzer nach dem Vertrag.
sentences.reading: /ziː fʁaːkt deːn ˌyːbɐˈzɛtsɐ naːx deːm fɛɐ̯ˈtʁaːk/

translations.de: Sie fragt den Übersetzer nach dem Vertrag.
translations.ipa: /ziː fʁaːkt deːn ˌyːbɐˈzɛtsɐ naːx deːm fɛɐ̯ˈtʁaːk/
translations.en: She asks the translator about the contract.
translations.es: Ella le pregunta al intérprete sobre el contrato.
translations.fr: Elle demande à l'interprète au sujet du contrat.
translations.zh-Hans: 她向翻译询问合同的事。
translations.yue: 佢問傳譯員有關合約嘅事。
translations.pt: Ela pergunta ao intérprete sobre o contrato.
translations.he: היא שואלת את המתורגמן לגבי החוזה.
translations.tr: Sözleşme hakkında tercümana bir soru soruyor.
translations.vi: Cô ấy hỏi thông dịch viên về hợp đồng.
translations.ar: هي تسأل المترجم الفوري عن العقد.
translations.nl: Ze vraagt de tolk naar het contract.
translations.hi: वह अनुबंध के बारे में दुभाषिए से पूछती है.
translations.el: Ρωτά τον διερμηνέα για το συμβόλαιο.
translations.id: Dia bertanya kepada penerjemah tentang kontrak.
translations.ro: Ea îl întreabă pe interpret despre contract.
translations.ja: 彼女は通訳に契約のことを尋ねる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative; here most likely 3rd person singular feminine as subject (capitalized at sentence start; could also be formal ‘you’).
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes an accusative object (person asked) and a ‘nach’-PP (topic).
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner for ‘Übersetzer’.
Common noun, masculine; accusative singular as the direct object (addressee of the question).
Preposition governing dative; here meaning ‘about/regarding’ in the construction ‘jemanden nach etwas fragen’.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determiner for ‘Vertrag’ after ‘nach’.
Common noun, masculine; dative singular as object of the preposition ‘nach’.

sentences.target: Unser Übersetzer kommt heute ein bisschen später.
sentences.reading: /ˈʊnzɐ ˌyːbɐˈzɛtsɐ kɔmt ˈhɔʏ̯tə aɪ̯n ˈbɪsçən ˈʃpɛːtɐ/

translations.de: Unser Übersetzer kommt heute ein bisschen später.
translations.ipa: /ˈʊnzɐ ˌyːbɐˈzɛtsɐ kɔmt ˈhɔʏ̯tə aɪ̯n ˈbɪsçən ˈʃpɛːtɐ/
translations.en: Our translator is coming a bit later today.
translations.es: Nuestro intérprete llegará un poco más tarde hoy.
translations.fr: Notre interprète arrivera un peu plus tard aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Il nostro interprete arriverà un po' più tardi oggi.
translations.ko: 오늘 우리 통역사가 조금 늦게 올 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的翻译今天会晚一点到。
translations.yue: 我哋個傳譯員今日會遲啲先到。
translations.ru: Наш переводчик сегодня придет немного позже.
translations.pt: Nosso intérprete vai chegar um pouco mais tarde hoje.
translations.he: המתורגמן שלנו יגיע היום קצת מאוחר יותר.
translations.tr: Tercümanımız bugün biraz daha geç gelecek.
translations.vi: Thông dịch viên của chúng tôi hôm nay sẽ đến muộn một chút.
translations.ar: المترجم الفوري لدينا سيصل اليوم متأخرًا قليلًا.
translations.nl: Onze tolk komt vandaag een beetje later.
translations.uk: Наш перекладач сьогодні прийде трохи пізніше.
translations.hu: A tolmácsunk ma egy kicsit később érkezik.
translations.hi: हमारा दुभाषिया आज थोड़ा देर से आएगा.
translations.pl: Nasz tłumacz przyjdzie dziś trochę później.
translations.el: Ο διερμηνέας μας θα έρθει σήμερα λίγο αργότερα.
translations.nb: Tolken vår kommer litt senere i dag.
translations.id: Penerjemah kami akan datang agak terlambat hari ini.
translations.sv: Vår tolk kommer lite senare i dag.
translations.ro: Interpretul nostru va veni puțin mai târziu astăzi.
translations.cs: Náš tlumočník dnes přijde o něco později.
translations.da: Vores tolk kommer lidt senere i dag.
translations.ja: うちの通訳は今日は少し遅れて来ます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person plural; nominative masculine singular (no ending) agreeing with ‘Übersetzer’.
Common noun, masculine; nominative singular as the subject.
Finite intransitive verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate, modified by temporal adverbs.
Temporal adverb indicating the day; sentence-level time frame.
Indefinite article used in the fixed quantifier ‘ein bisschen’; part of a degree modifier functioning adverbially.
Noun in the fixed expression ‘ein bisschen’; the whole phrase acts as a degree adverb modifying ‘später’.
Comparative adverb (from ‘spät’); temporal modifier of ‘kommt’, intensified by ‘ein bisschen’.

es: Necesito un intérprete para la reunión.
Mi hermano es traductor en Berlín.
Ella le pregunta al intérprete sobre el contrato.
Nuestro intérprete llegará un poco más tarde hoy.

Mon frère est traducteur à Berlin.
Elle demande à l'interprète au sujet du contrat.
Notre interprète arrivera un peu plus tard aujourd'hui.
it: Ho bisogno di un interprete per la riunione.
Mio fratello è traduttore a Berlino.
Il nostro interprete arriverà un po' più tardi oggi.
ko: 오늘 우리 통역사가 조금 늦게 올 거예요.

我们的翻译今天会晚一点到。

我哋個傳譯員今日會遲啲先到。

Наш переводчик сегодня придет немного позже.

Meu irmão é tradutor em Berlim.

मेरा भाई बर्लिन में अनुवादक है.
वह अनुबंध के बारे में दुभाषिए से पूछती है.

Nasz tłumacz przyjdzie dziś trochę później.

Dia bertanya kepada penerjemah tentang kontrak.
